title: Craftable Gunpowder balanced
description: This is a more balanced way of crafting gunpowder in vanilla. Primarily for Vic's Point Blank mod in my Modpack Simplex Modern Survival for small arms ammo.
body:
This is a vanilla friendly way to make gun powder balanced for Vic's point blank mod.

- use granit or diorite to make potassium oxide powder in a crafting table or inventory
  
![tuffadded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a0f778ad442fdd18999206d652eca76ba53fa08.png)
  
- combine 1 powder and 1 sugar to make a potassium sugar mix

![making sugar mix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02b968f70935468dad526557d3bbcf4922aac870.png)

- smelt or blast the potassium sugar mix to make potassium nitrate

![smelting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0e7cd5058cb7273fc0313225da2ea8ae0acd26e.png)
  
- 6 potassium nitrate, 2 coal/charcoal, 1 glow stone dust to make gunpowder
  
![gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fc7cc0c21578799073da956b7ba680e5514bbe4.png)

This is my first mod I have made for any game. Thank you for checking it out!
